description:
GIVEN a non-MLB team has a matchup against an MLB team

*NOTE:* These types of matchups occur during Spring Training

steps.action:
WHEN a game tile has focus
OR a game tile does not have focus
steps.result:
THEN a "LOCKED" badge does not display in the upper left corner of the game tile
AND "FINAL" displays in the upper right corner of the game tile
AND the game match up with respective score is displayed
AND the Pitching Results are displayed
AND the Broadcast Networks are displayed 
AND the logo for the non-MLB team is displayed as a generic baseball
